# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

## [0.1.1] - 2026-03-04

### Bug Fixes

- Use owning String type instead of Segment view for read ingestion ([#5](https://github.com/fulcrumgenomics/rust-yara/pull/5))
- Define NDEBUG to disable SeqAn2 debug assertions ([#7](https://github.com/fulcrumgenomics/rust-yara/pull/7))
- Bounds-check SA entries, fix RecordCollector copy semantics, review fixes ([#8](https://github.com/fulcrumgenomics/rust-yara/pull/8))
